case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HEALTH CARE AND REHAB, INC. VS. CARLOS BUCHANAN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-30-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-30-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HEALTH CARE AND REHAB, INC. IS PRESENT. SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-30-2017 - JUDGMENT.
